chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-977 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on CMA 7914/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on statement dt.24.11.2025(Withdrawal) 4.For hearing of main case 25-11-2025 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for petitioner. **** By filing urgent application, counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition. In this regard, statement dated 24.11.2025 duly supported with biometric affidavit of the petitioner has also been filed for withdrawal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
